text: The driver of a motor vehicle when traveling on down grade upon any highway shall not coast with the gears of such vehicle in neutral.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 3. Driving, Overtaking, and Passing [21650 - 21761]
#### Article 2. Additional Driving Rules [21700 - 21721]
##### § 21710

The driver of a motor vehicle when traveling on down grade upon any highway shall not coast with the gears of such vehicle in neutral.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The driver of a motor vehicle when traveling on down grade upon any highway shall not coast with the gears of such vehicle in neutral.
